# Purpose
The directive `.. include:: ../CONTRIBUTING.rst` is used to include the contents of the `CONTRIBUTING.rst` file into the current document. This allows the documentation to incorporate contribution guidelines from an external file, ensuring that the information is consistent and centralized.
